hero.headline: The Jade Sea Revelation
hero.subHeadline: Where the wind never stops and the turquoise water glows in a black lava desert.

theNyotaLens.architectNote: Our most extreme luxury play. Access is almost exclusively via private charter to the Cradle of Mankind at Koobi Fora.

sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: A turquoise mirage in a volcanic desert. Stand on the rim of Central Island and witness a landscape that defies survival.
Walking the archaeological sites of Koobi Fora. A journey to the beginning of the human narrative.
Immersive encounters with the Turkana people. Learning resilience from the masters of the arid North.

pairsWellWith.reasoning: The Grand Northern Circuit. Pushing the boundaries of exploration beyond the familiar.
